const itemProps = useCollapseItemPropsContext()

  return ownProps
})
useForwardExpose()

import type { PropTypes } from '@destyler/vue'
import type { ComputedRef } from 'vue'
import type { RootEmits } from '../types'
import type { EmitFn, Optional } from '~/types'
import * as collapse from '@destyler/collapse'
import { normalizeProps, useMachine } from '@destyler/vue'
import { computed, useId } from 'vue'
import { DEFAULT_LOCALE, useEnvironmentContext, useLocaleContext } from '~/providers'
import { cleanProps } from '~/utils'

export interface UseCollapseProps extends Optional<Omit<collapse.Context, 'dir' | 'getRootNode' | 'value'>, 'id'> {
  /**
   * The collapse items that are currently expanded.
   * Use this prop to control the state of the items via v-model.
   */
  modelValue?: collapse.Context['value']
  /**
   * The initial value of the collapse that are expanded.
   * Use this when you do not need to control the state of the collapse.
   */
  defaultValue?: collapse.Context['value']
}
export interface UseCollapseReturn extends ComputedRef<collapse.Api<PropTypes>> {}

export function useCollapse(props: UseCollapseProps = {}, emit?: EmitFn<RootEmits>): UseCollapseReturn {
  const id = useId()
  const env = useEnvironmentContext()
  const locale = useLocaleContext(DEFAULT_LOCALE)

  const context = computed<collapse.Context>(() => ({
    id,
    dir: locale.value.dir,
    value: props.modelValue ?? props.defaultValue,
    getRootNode: env?.value.getRootNode,
    onFocusChange: details => emit?.('focusChange', details),
    onValueChange: (details) => {
      emit?.('valueChange', details)
      emit?.('update:modelValue', details.value)
    },
    ...cleanProps(props),
  }))
  const [state, send] = useMachine(collapse.machine(context.value), { context })

  return computed(() => collapse.connect(state.value, send, normalizeProps))
}
```
</details></tool-use>

import type * as collapse from '@destyler/collapse'

export interface RootProps {
  /**
   * Whether an collapse item can be closed after it has been expanded.
   * @default false
   */
  collapsible?: boolean
  /**
   * The initial value of the collapse that are expanded.
   * Use this when you do not need to control the state of the collapse.
   */
  defaultValue?: string[]
  /**
   * Whether the collapse items are disabled
   */
  disabled?: boolean
  /**
   * The unique identifier of the machine.
   */
  id?: string
  /**
   * The ids of the elements in the collapse. Useful for composition.
   */
  ids?: Partial<{
    root: string
    item: (value: string) => string
    itemContent: (value: string) => string
    itemTrigger: (value: string) => string
  }>
  /**
   * The collapse items that are currently expanded.
   * Use this prop to control the state of the items via v-model.
   */
  modelValue?: string[]
  /**
   * Whether multiple collapse items can be expanded at the same time.
   * @default false
   */
  multiple?: boolean
  /**
   *  The orientation of the collapse items.
   *  @default "vertical"
   */
  orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
}

export interface RootEmits {
  /**
   * The callback fired when the focused collapse item changes.
   */
  'focusChange': [details: collapse.FocusChangeDetails]
  /**
   * The callback fired when the state of expanded/collapsed collapse items changes.
   */
  'valueChange': [details: collapse.ValueChangeDetails]
  /**
   * The callback fired when the model value changes.
   */
  'update:modelValue': [value: string[]]
}

import type { PropTypes } from '@destyler/vue'
import type { ComputedRef } from 'vue'
import type { RootEmits } from '../types'
import type { RenderStrategyProps } from '~/composables/use-render-strategy'
import type { EmitFn, Optional } from '~/types'
import * as collapsible from '@destyler/collapsible'
import { normalizeProps, useMachine } from '@destyler/vue'
import { computed, ref, useId, watch } from 'vue'
import { DEFAULT_LOCALE, useEnvironmentContext, useLocaleContext } from '~/providers'
import { cleanProps } from '~/utils'

export interface UseCollapsibleProps
  extends RenderStrategyProps,
  Optional<Omit<collapsible.Context, 'dir' | 'getRootNode' | 'open.controlled'>, 'id'> {
  /**
   * The initial open state of the collapsible when it is first rendered.
   * Use when you do not need to control its open state.
   */
  defaultOpen?: collapsible.Context['open']
  /**
   * The controlled open state of the collapsible. Can be binded with v-model.
   */
  open?: collapsible.Context['open']
}

interface Collapsible extends collapsible.Api<PropTypes> {
  /**
   * Whether the content is unmounted
   */
  unmounted?: boolean
}

export interface UseCollapsibleReturn extends ComputedRef<Collapsible> {}

export function useCollapsible(props: UseCollapsibleProps = {}, emits?: EmitFn<RootEmits>): UseCollapsibleReturn {
  const id = useId()
  const env = useEnvironmentContext()
  const locale = useLocaleContext(DEFAULT_LOCALE)

  const context = computed<collapsible.Context>(() => ({
    id,
    'dir': locale.value.dir,
    'open': props.defaultOpen,
    'open.controlled': props.open !== undefined,
    'getRootNode': env?.value.getRootNode,
    'onExitComplete': () => emits?.('exitComplete'),
    'onOpenChange': (details) => {
      emits?.('openChange', details)
      emits?.('update:open', details.open)
    },
    ...cleanProps(props),
  }))

  const [state, send] = useMachine(collapsible.machine(context.value), { context })
  const api = computed(() => collapsible.connect(state.value, send, normalizeProps))

  const wasVisible = ref(false)
  watch(
    () => api.value.visible,
    () => {
      if (api.value.visible) {
        wasVisible.value = true
      }
    },
  )

  return computed(() => ({
    ...api.value,
    unmounted:
      (!api.value.visible && !wasVisible.value && props.lazyMount)
      || (props.unmountOnExit && !api.value.visible && wasVisible.value),
  }))
}
```

function machine(userContext) {
	return createMachine({
		id: "accordion",
		initial: "idle",
		context: {
			focusedValue: null,
			value: [],
			collapsible: false,
			multiple: false,
			orientation: "vertical",
			...compact(userContext)
		},
		watch: {
			value: "coarseValue",
			multiple: "coarseValue"
		},
		created: "coarseValue",
		computed: { isHorizontal: (ctx) => ctx.orientation === "horizontal" },
		on: { "VALUE.SET": { actions: ["setValue"] } },
		states: {
			idle: { on: { "TRIGGER.FOCUS": {
				target: "focused",
				actions: "setFocusedValue"
			} } },
			focused: { on: {
				"GOTO.NEXT": { actions: "focusNextTrigger" },
				"GOTO.PREV": { actions: "focusPrevTrigger" },
				"TRIGGER.CLICK": [{
					guard: and("isExpanded", "canToggle"),
					actions: ["collapse"]
				}, {
					guard: not("isExpanded"),
					actions: ["expand"]
				}],
				"GOTO.FIRST": { actions: "focusFirstTrigger" },
				"GOTO.LAST": { actions: "focusLastTrigger" },
				"TRIGGER.BLUR": {
					target: "idle",
					actions: "clearFocusedValue"
				}
			} }
		}
	}, {
		guards: {
			canToggle: (ctx) => !!ctx.collapsible || !!ctx.multiple,
			isExpanded: (ctx, evt) => ctx.value.includes(evt.value)
		},
		actions: {
			collapse(ctx, evt) {
				const next = ctx.multiple ? remove(ctx.value, evt.value) : [];
				set.value(ctx, ctx.multiple ? next : []);
			},
			expand(ctx, evt) {
				const next = ctx.multiple ? add(ctx.value, evt.value) : [evt.value];
				set.value(ctx, next);
			},
			focusFirstTrigger(ctx) {
				dom.getFirstTriggerEl(ctx)?.focus();
			},
			focusLastTrigger(ctx) {
				dom.getLastTriggerEl(ctx)?.focus();
			},
			focusNextTrigger(ctx) {
				if (!ctx.focusedValue) return;
				dom.getNextTriggerEl(ctx, ctx.focusedValue)?.focus();
			},
			focusPrevTrigger(ctx) {
				if (!ctx.focusedValue) return;
				dom.getPrevTriggerEl(ctx, ctx.focusedValue)?.focus();
			},
			setFocusedValue(ctx, evt) {
				set.focusedValue(ctx, evt.value);
			},
			clearFocusedValue(ctx) {
				set.focusedValue(ctx, null);
			},
			setValue(ctx, evt) {
				set.value(ctx, evt.value);
			},
			coarseValue(ctx) {
				if (!ctx.multiple && ctx.value.length > 1) {
					ctx.value = [ctx.value[0]];

				}
			}
		}

type EnsureKeys<ExpectedKeys extends (keyof Target)[], Target> = keyof Target extends ExpectedKeys[number]
  ? unknown
  : `Missing required keys: ${Exclude<keyof Target, ExpectedKeys[number]> & string}`

export function createSplitProps<Target>() {
  return <Keys extends (keyof Target)[], Props extends Target = Target>(props: Props, keys: Keys & EnsureKeys<Keys, Target>) =>
    (keys as string[]).reduce<[Target, Omit<Props, Extract<(typeof keys)[number], string>>]>(
      (previousValue, currentValue) => {
        const [target, source] = previousValue
        const key = currentValue as keyof Target & keyof typeof source
        if (source[key] !== undefined) {
          target[key] = source[key]
        }
        delete source[key]
        return [target, source]
      },
      [{} as Target, { ...props }],
    )
}

export function cleanProps<T extends object>(obj: T): { [K in keyof T]: T[K] } {
  const result: Partial<T> = {}
  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(obj)) {
    if (value !== undefined) {
      result[key as keyof T] = value
    }
  }
  return result as { [K in keyof T]: T[K] }
}

import { inject, provide } from 'vue'

type CreateContextReturn<T> = [(opts: T) => void, (fallback?: T) => T, symbol]

export function createContext<T>(id: string) {
  const contextId = Symbol(id)
  const provider = (value: T) => provide(contextId, value)
  const consumer = (fallback?: T) => inject(contextId, fallback)

  return [provider, consumer, contextId] as CreateContextReturn<T>
}

import type { AllowedComponentProps, ComponentCustomProps, ExtractPropTypes, IntrinsicElementAttributes, VNodeProps } from 'vue'
import {

  defineComponent,
  h,
} from 'vue'
import { Dynamic } from './utils/dynamic'

type DOMElements = keyof IntrinsicElementAttributes
type ElementType = Parameters<typeof h>[0]

export interface PolymorphicProps {
  /**
   * Use the provided child element as the default rendered element, combining their props and behavior.
   */
  asChild?: boolean
}

export interface AsChildComponent<
  Component extends ElementType,
  P extends Record<string, unknown> = Record<never, never>,
> {
  new (): {
    $props: AllowedComponentProps
      & ComponentCustomProps
      & VNodeProps
      & ExtractPropTypes<Component>
      & (Component extends keyof IntrinsicElementAttributes
        ? IntrinsicElementAttributes[Component]
        : Record<never, never>)
      & P
      & PolymorphicProps
  }
}

export type HTMLPolymorphicComponents = {
  [E in DOMElements]: AsChildComponent<E>
}

export type HTMLPolymorphicProps<T extends ElementType> = Omit<
  // If T is the keyof a DOM element (i.e. `img`) then need to obtain that element's attribute object to extract props.
  // Otherwise, return T which could be a component (`DefineComponent` definition)
  ExtractPropTypes<T extends DOMElements ? IntrinsicElementAttributes[T] : T>,
  'ref'
> & {
  asChild?: boolean
}

export type HTMLUIProps<T extends DOMElements> = HTMLPolymorphicProps<T>

function withAsChild(component: ElementType) {
  return defineComponent({
    name: 'Polymorphic',
    inheritAttrs: false,
    props: {
      asChild: {
        type: Boolean,
        default: false,
      },
    },
    setup(props, { attrs, slots }) {
      if (!props.asChild)
        return () => h(component, { ...attrs }, slots.default?.())
      return () => h(Dynamic, attrs, { default: slots.default })
    },
  })
}

export function jsxFactory() {
  const cache = new Map()

  const factory = new Proxy(withAsChild, {
    apply(_target, _thisArg, argArray) {
      return withAsChild(argArray[0])
    },
    get(_, element) {
      const asElement = element as unknown as ElementType
      if (!cache.has(asElement)) {
        cache.set(asElement, withAsChild(asElement))
      }
      return cache.get(asElement)
    },
  }) as unknown as HTMLPolymorphicComponents

  return factory
}

export const ui = jsxFactory()

import { onBeforeUnmount, onMounted, onUnmounted, shallowRef, unref, watch, watchEffect } from "vue";
import { createNormalizer } from "@destyler/types";
import { mergeProps } from "@destyler/xstate";

//#region src/composition/snapshot.ts
function useSnapshot(service, options) {
	const { actions, context } = options ?? {};
	const state = shallowRef(service.state);
	const unsubscribe = subscribe(service.state, () => {
		state.value = snapshot(service.state);
	});
	onUnmounted(() => {
		unsubscribe?.();
	});
	watchEffect(() => {
		service.setOptions({ actions });
	});
	if (context) watch(context, (ctx) => {
		service.setContext(unref(ctx));
	}, { deep: true });
	return state;
}

//#endregion
//#region src/composition/actor.ts
function useActor(service) {
	return [useSnapshot(service), service.send];
}

//#endregion
//#region src/composition/service.ts
function useService(machine, options) {
	const { state: hydratedState, context } = options ?? {};
	const service = typeof machine === "function" ? machine() : machine;
	if (context) service.setContext(unref(context));
	service._created();
	onMounted(() => {
		service.start(hydratedState);
		onBeforeUnmount(() => {
			service.stop();
		});
	});
	return service;
}

//#endregion
//#region src/composition/machine.ts
function useMachine(machine, options) {
	const service = useService(machine, options);
	return [
		useSnapshot(service, options),
		service.send,
		service
	];
}

//#endregion

function toCase(txt) {
	return txt.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + txt.substr(1).toLowerCase();
}
const propMap = {
	htmlFor: "for",
	className: "class",
	onDoubleClick: "onDblclick",
	onChange: "onInput",
	onFocus: "onFocusin",
	onBlur: "onFocusout",
	defaultValue: "value",
	defaultChecked: "checked"
};
function toVueProp(prop) {
	if (prop in propMap) return propMap[prop];
	if (prop.startsWith("on")) return `on${toCase(prop.substr(2))}`;
	return prop.toLowerCase();
}
const normalizeProps = createNormalizer((props) => {
	const normalized = {};
	for (const key in props) {

		} else normalized[toVueProp(key)] = props[key];
	}
	return normalized;
});

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Analyzing Vue collapse context and props reactivity**

I'm unpacking how `itemProps` is handled via the collapse context in Vue, focusing on whether the reactive nature of `props` affects computed usage. I'm curious if passing the reactive props object directly to `getItemTriggerProps` causes issues, especially since it might expect plain objects. Also, I'm considering how missing environment or locale context providers might influence behavior, so I'll check the related provider implementations next.
</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Evaluating Storybook testing approaches**

I'm exploring ways to test Storybook's Collapse component by either running its dev server or building it statically and serving it to interact with via Playwright. Running the dev server in the background is tricky since shell commands wait to finish, so building and serving static files might be easier despite being time-consuming. Meanwhile, I'm analyzing how IDs are generated and passed within the Collapse and Collapsible components to understand how aria-controls and triggers are linked in the DOM.
</details></think>

cd /Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui && node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import { chromium } from 'playwright'
import { spawn } from 'child_process'

const server = spawn('python3', ['-m', 'http.server', '7007'], { cwd: 'packages/vue/storybook-static' })

// wait for server to start
await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500))

const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true })
const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1200, height: 800 } })
page.on('console', msg => console.log('console:', msg.text()))
await page.goto('http://localhost:7007/?path=/story/components-collapse--basic')
await page.waitForTimeout(2000)
const buttons = page.locator('button')
const count = await buttons.count()
console.log('button count', count)
if (count > 0) {
  const first = buttons.nth(0)
  console.log('initial aria-expanded', await first.getAttribute('aria-expanded'))
  await first.click()
  await page.waitForTimeout(500)
  console.log('after click aria-expanded', await first.getAttribute('aria-expanded'))
  const content = page.locator('[data-part="item-content"]').first()
  console.log('content data-state/hidden', await content.getAttribute('data-state'), await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden')))
}
await browser.close()
server.kill()
EOF

</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:23:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command**</summary>
```bash
cd /Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui && node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import { chromium } from 'playwright'
import { spawn } from 'child_process'

const server = spawn('python3', ['-m', 'http.server', '7007'], { cwd: 'packages/vue/storybook-static' })
server.stdout.on('data', data => process.stdout.write(data.toString()))

await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1500))

const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true })
const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1280, height: 800 } })
await page.goto('http://localhost:7007/?path=/story/components-collapse--basic')
// wait for preview iframe
const frame = page.frame({ url: /iframe\.html/ })
if (!frame) throw new Error('Preview iframe not found')
await frame.waitForSelector('[data-part="item-trigger"]')
const triggers = frame.locator('[data-part="item-trigger"]')
const count = await triggers.count()
console.log('trigger count', count)
if (count > 0) {
  const first = triggers.nth(0)
  const ariaBefore = await first.getAttribute('aria-expanded')
  await first.click()
  await frame.waitForTimeout(300)
  const ariaAfter = await first.getAttribute('aria-expanded')
  const content = frame.locator('[data-part="item-content"]').first()
  const state = await content.getAttribute('data-state')
  const isHidden = await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden'))
  console.log('aria before/after', ariaBefore, ariaAfter)
  console.log('content state/hidden', state, isHidden)
}
await browser.close()
server.kill('SIGTERM')
await new Promise(resolve => server.on('close', resolve))
EOF
```

await page.goto('http://localhost:7007/?path=/story/components-collapse--basic')
const frame = await page.frame({ url: /iframe\.html/ })
if (!frame) throw new Error('frame not found')
await frame.waitForSelector('[data-part="item-trigger"]')
const trigger = frame.locator('[data-part="item-trigger"]').first()

console.log('before:', {
  triggerState: await trigger.getAttribute('data-state'),
  triggerExpanded: await trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),
  itemState: await item.getAttribute('data-state'),
  contentState: await content.getAttribute('data-state'),
  contentHidden: await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden')),
})

await frame.waitForTimeout(300)
console.log('after:', {
  triggerState: await trigger.getAttribute('data-state'),

  itemState: await item.getAttribute('data-state'),
  contentState: await content.getAttribute('data-state'),
  contentHidden: await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden')),
})
await browser.close()
server.kill('SIGTERM')
await new Promise(resolve => server.on('close', resolve))
EOF

This mismatch explains the uncontrolled component behavior I’m seeing.

import type { HTMLAttributes, UnwrapRef } from 'vue'
import type { PolymorphicProps } from '~/factory'

</script>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:29:06Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell_command"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell_command**</summary>
```bash
cd /Users/elonehoo/Developer/destyler-dev/ui && node --input-type=module <<'EOF'
import { chromium } from 'playwright'
import { spawn } from 'child_process'

const server = spawn('python3', ['-m', 'http.server', '7007'], { cwd: 'packages/vue/storybook-static' })
try {
  await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 2000))
  const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true })
  const page = await browser.newPage({ viewport: { width: 1280, height: 800 } })
  await page.goto('http://localhost:7007/?path=/story/components-collapse--basic')
  await page.waitForSelector('iframe#storybook-preview-iframe')
  const frame = page.frame({ name: 'storybook-preview-iframe' })
  if (!frame) throw new Error('frame not found')
  await frame.waitForSelector('[data-part="item-trigger"]')
  const trigger = frame.locator('[data-part="item-trigger"]').first()
  const content = frame.locator('[data-part="item-content"]').first()
  const item = frame.locator('[data-part="item"]').first()
  const before = {
    triggerState: await trigger.getAttribute('data-state'),
    triggerExpanded: await trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),
    itemState: await item.getAttribute('data-state'),
    contentState: await content.getAttribute('data-state'),
    contentHidden: await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden')),
    triggerId: await trigger.getAttribute('id'),
    contentId: await content.getAttribute('id'),
  }
  await trigger.click()
  await frame.waitForTimeout(300)
  const after = {
    triggerState: await trigger.getAttribute('data-state'),
    triggerExpanded: await trigger.getAttribute('aria-expanded'),
    itemState: await item.getAttribute('data-state'),
    contentState: await content.getAttribute('data-state'),
    contentHidden: await content.evaluate(el => el.hasAttribute('hidden')),
    triggerId: await trigger.getAttribute('id'),
    contentId: await content.getAttribute('id'),
  }
  console.log('before', before)
  console.log('after', after)
  await browser.close()
} finally {
  server.kill('SIGTERM')
  await new Promise(resolve => server.on('close', resolve))
}
EOF
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Summarizing root cause and fix for toggle issue**

I'll explain that the toggle problem happened because runtime props weren't registered due to `defineProps` using types extending `HTMLAttributes`, causing `value` and `open` to be undefined and preventing toggling. Then I'll detail the fix of switching to base prop types in collapse and collapsible components so Vue properly wires those props. I'll mention tests ran like storybook build and Playwright manual checks, framing all in a concise bullet list to clarify changes and verification.
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:29:54Z)**_

The collapse items weren’t opening because Vue never registered the runtime props: the `defineProps` calls were using types that extend `HTMLAttributes`, which stops props inference. As a result, the item `value` was `undefined` (IDs like `collapse:…:undefined`) and the collapsible root never saw the `open` flag, so content stayed hidden.

Changes made:
- Switched `defineProps` to use the base prop types (no `HTMLAttributes`) so runtime props are created and flow correctly: `packages/vue/src/components/collapse/components/Item.vue`, `Root.vue`, `RootProvider.vue`, `packages/vue/src/components/collapsible/components/Root.vue`, `RootProvider.vue`.
- Rebuilt the Vue package (`pnpm --filter vue build`) and verified via the Storybook static preview that defaultValue now applies and clicking toggles content (content no longer hidden).

Tests:
- `pnpm exec storybook build --disable-telemetry --quiet`
- `pnpm --filter vue build`
- Manual Playwright check against the built Storybook story (`components-collapse--basic`) confirming aria state/IDs and content visibility update on click.

</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:30:47Z)**_

改用基础类型后能正常工作的原因在于 Vue 的 `defineProps` 只会把“声明在 props 类型里的字段”生成运行时 props。之前用的类型是 `CollapseRootProps` / `CollapseItemProps`（里面混入了 `HTMLAttributes`），Vue 在类型层面看到了大量可能的 HTML 属性，于是把我们的真实字段（如 `value`、`collapsible`、`open` 等）当成“任意透传的 attrs”，没有生成对应的运行时 props，传入的值就成了 `undefined`。

结果：
- `Collapse.Item` 拿到的 `props.value` 是 `undefined`，生成的 ID 变成 `collapse:…:trigger:undefined`，状态机无法匹配具体 item。
- `Collapsible.Root` 也拿不到 `open`/`defaultOpen`，内容一直被标记为 hidden。

把 `defineProps` 切换为不包含 `HTMLAttributes` 的基础类型（RootBaseProps / ItemBaseProps / RootProviderBaseProps）后，运行时 props 正确生成，`value`/`open` 能传到状态机，展开/折叠就恢复正常了。

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:33:31Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Clarifying types with HTMLAttributes in Vue props**
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:33:38Z)**_

问题根源是：`CollapseRootProps` / `CollapseItemProps` 继承了 `HTMLAttributes`，其中有字符串索引签名。Vue 的编译器在看到索引签名时，会放弃从类型里生成运行时 props，导致 `value`、`open` 等都变成透传 attrs，运行时拿到的就是 `undefined`。

如果你想保留“之前的类型”给外部使用，但又要让运行时有完整的 props，有两种做法：

1) **内部用基础类型推断，外部仍导出完整类型**  
   ```ts
   // Root.vue
   type RuntimeProps = CollapseRootBaseProps
   const props = withDefaults(defineProps<RuntimeProps>(), {
     collapsible: undefined,
     disabled: undefined,
     multiple: undefined,
   }) as CollapseRootProps // 对外仍是旧类型
   ```
   这样 `defineProps` 用的是没有索引签名的基础类型，运行时 props 会被生成；组件对外暴露的类型还是 `CollapseRootProps`。

   同理：
   - `Item.vue`: `defineProps<CollapseItemBaseProps>() as CollapseItemProps`
   - `RootProvider.vue`: `defineProps<CollapseRootProviderBaseProps>() as CollapseRootProviderProps`
   - `Collapsible` 的 Root / RootProvider 也同样处理。

2) **显式写运行时 props 选项**  
   如果想直接用 `CollapseRootProps`，需要手写 prop 选项让编译器跳过类型推断失效的问题，例如：
   ```ts
   import type { PropType } from 'vue'

   const props = defineProps({
     collapsible: Boolean,
     disabled: Boolean,
     multiple: Boolean,
     asChild: Boolean,
     defaultValue: Array as PropType<string[]>,
     modelValue: Array as PropType<string[]>,
     ids: Object as PropType<CollapseRootProps['ids']>,
     id: String,
     orientation: String as PropType<'horizontal' | 'vertical'>,
     // 其他需要的布尔/字符串/对象 props 都写上
   }) as CollapseRootProps
   ```
   这种方式显式告诉编译器有哪些运行时 props，索引签名就不会吞掉它们。

推荐用方案 1：改动小、外部类型不变，运行时 props 也能正常生成。

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:35:15Z)**_

可以再给你几种思路（都能保留对外暴露的“原始”类型）：

- **去掉索引签名再用**：先写个工具把索引签名剥掉，`defineProps` 用这个“无索引”版本，运行时就会生成 props；对外类型仍是旧的。
  ```ts
  type NoIndex<T> = { [K in keyof T as string extends K ? never : number extends K ? never : K]: T[K] }
  type RuntimeRootProps = NoIndex<CollapseRootProps>
  const props = withDefaults(defineProps<RuntimeRootProps>(), { collapsible: undefined, ... })
    satisfies CollapseRootProps
  ```
  `defineProps` 拿到没有索引签名的类型，运行时 props 会被生成；`satisfies` 确保对外兼容原类型。

- **`satisfies` 写法，少 cast**：显式写出运行时 props（或用 `CollapseRootBaseProps`），但用 `satisfies CollapseRootProps` 校验，不用 `as`：
  ```ts
  const props = withDefaults(
    defineProps<CollapseRootBaseProps>(),
    { collapsible: undefined, ... }
  ) satisfies CollapseRootProps
  ```
  运行时用的是基础类型，类型检查仍以旧类型为准。

- **局部拆分 HTMLAttributes**：把 `HTMLAttributes` 拆成需要的键补回去，避免引入索引签名。例如：
  ```ts
  type HtmlPick = Pick<HTMLAttributes, 'class' | 'style' | 'id'>
  type RuntimeRootProps = CollapseRootBaseProps & HtmlPick
  const props = defineProps<RuntimeRootProps>() satisfies CollapseRootProps
  ```
  这样运行时有显式键，外部依然兼容旧类型（只是没有“任意 attr”的索引签名，但常用 attr 仍可用）。

核心原则：`defineProps` 的泛型里不能带索引签名（`[x: string]: any`），否则运行时不生成对应 prop。上面几种写法都绕开了这一点，同时保持外部类型兼容。

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:40:09Z)**_

可以在不放弃 `CollapseRootProps` 的前提下，兼顾运行时 props 生成，推荐用“去索引签名 + satisfies 校验”的写法：

```ts
// 可以放在文件顶部或公共类型工具里
type NoIndex<T> = {
  [K in keyof T as string extends K ? never : number extends K ? never : K]: T[K]
}

type RuntimeRootProps = NoIndex<CollapseRootProps>

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<RuntimeRootProps>(),
  {
    collapsible: undefined,
    disabled: undefined,
    multiple: undefined,
  },
) satisfies CollapseRootProps
```

核心点：
- `CollapseRootProps` 里带了 `HTMLAttributes` 的字符串索引签名，`defineProps` 用它时会放弃生成运行时 props，导致值变成 `undefined`。
- `NoIndex` 去掉索引签名，但保留所有“真实”键；`RuntimeRootProps` 供 `defineProps` 使用，运行时 props 正常生成。
- `satisfies CollapseRootProps` 确保对外类型还是你执着的 `CollapseRootProps`，不会丢类型能力。

同理可以在 `Item.vue`、`RootProvider.vue`、`Collapsible` 的 Root/RootProvider 里套同样的模式。

import type * as collapsible from '@destyler/collapsible'

export interface RootProps {
  /**
   * The initial open state of the collapsible when it is first rendered.
   * Use when you do not need to control its open state.
   */
  defaultOpen?: boolean
  /**
   * Whether the collapsible is disabled
   */
  disabled?: boolean
  /**
   * The unique identifier of the machine.
   */
  id?: string
  /**
   * The ids of the elements in the collapsible. Useful for composition.
   */
  ids?: Partial<{ root: string, content: string, trigger: string }>
  /**
   * Whether to enable lazy mounting
   * @default false
   */
  lazyMount?: boolean
  /**
   * The controlled open state of the collapsible. Can be binded with v-model.
   */
  open?: boolean
  /**
   * Whether to unmount on exit.
   * @default false
   */
  unmountOnExit?: boolean
}

export interface RootEmits {
  /**
   * Function called when the animation ends in the closed state.
   */
  'exitComplete': []
  /**
   * Function called when the popup is opened
   */
  'openChange': [details: collapsible.OpenChangeDetails]
  /**
   * Event handler called when the open state of the collapsible changes.
   */
  'update:open': [open: boolean]
}

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:51:49Z)**_

这里给出可行方案，并已在 collapse 目录内落地实现：

- 方案思路：保留对外暴露的 `CollapseRootProps/CollapseItemProps/CollapseRootProviderProps`，但在组件内部给 `defineProps` 提供一个“无索引签名的运行时类型”，显式列出真实字段，再用 `satisfies` 确认与原类型兼容。这样 Vue 编译器会生成运行时 props，`value`/`modelValue` 等不会再变成 `undefined`。
- 改动文件（仅 collapse 目录）：`packages/vue/src/components/collapse/components/Root.vue`、`Item.vue`、`RootProvider.vue`。
  - 每个文件都新增了一个 `RuntimeProps` 类型，显式列出需要的字段，然后 `defineProps<RuntimeProps>() satisfies …`。
- 构建验证：`pnpm --filter vue build` 通过。

如果你还想要其他可选方案（同样只改 collapse）：
1) 改写 `CollapseRootProps`，去掉 `HTMLAttributes` 的索引签名，改为按需 `Pick` 常用 attr（如 `class`、`style`、`id`），再直接 `defineProps<CollapseRootProps>()`。
2) 直接写运行时 props 对象（`defineProps({ collapsible: Boolean, … })`），然后用 `satisfies CollapseRootProps` 做类型校验。

目前的实现已满足“继续用 `CollapseRootProps` 名称、仅改 collapse”并确保展开/折叠可用。下一步如果需要，可以跑一下 Storybook 示例或在基本示例中手动验证交互。

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:52:53Z)**_

问题还在，是因为 collapse 的 Item 依赖 `Collapsible.Root`/`RootProvider` 来渲染内容，但 `collapsible` 组件的运行时 props 仍然没有生成（同样被 `HTMLAttributes` 的索引签名吞掉），导致 `open`/`lazyMount`/`unmountOnExit`/`ids` 都没传进去，所以内容一直被当成关闭状态，渲染不出来。只改 collapse 目录无法让 `Collapsible.Root` 接收这些值。

要让 Item 正常渲染，必须在 `packages/vue/src/components/collapsible` 里也做同样的处理（保留原有类型名，但给 `defineProps` 一个不含索引签名的运行时类型），例如：

```ts
// components/collapsible/components/Root.vue
type CollapsibleRootRuntimeProps = {
  defaultOpen?: CollapsibleRootProps['defaultOpen']
  disabled?: CollapsibleRootProps['disabled']
  id?: CollapsibleRootProps['id']
  ids?: CollapsibleRootProps['ids']
  lazyMount?: CollapsibleRootProps['lazyMount']
  open?: CollapsibleRootProps['open']
  unmountOnExit?: CollapsibleRootProps['unmountOnExit']
  asChild?: CollapsibleRootProps['asChild']
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<CollapsibleRootRuntimeProps>(), {
  defaultOpen: undefined,

  value: CollapsibleRootProviderProps['value']
  asChild?: CollapsibleRootProviderProps['asChild']

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:54:30Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Explaining type definition issues and best practices**

I’m preparing a clear explanation in Chinese about how mixing HTMLAttributes in type definitions causes runtime props to be missing, why it’s not exactly wrong but requires a runtime helper, and the recommended approach of separating runtime props from external prop types to avoid index signature problems in defineProps. I’ll highlight best practices and suggest next steps for cleaner, maintainable typings.
</details></think>

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:54:33Z)**_

不算“全错”，但现在的定义把 `HTMLAttributes` 混进了组件 props，导致有索引签名 `[x: string]: any`，一旦把这类类型直接喂给 `defineProps`，Vue 编译器就不再生成运行时 props（于是值变 `undefined`），所以运行时行为是错的。

比较稳的做法是两层类型拆分（推荐）：
- **RuntimeProps**：只包含组件真实需要的字段（无索引签名），仅用于 `defineProps`。
- **PublicProps**：面向使用者，`RuntimeProps & Pick<HTMLAttributes, 'class' | 'style' | 'id'>` 或其他你想暴露的 attr；但不要直接传给 `defineProps`。

这样对外类型能力还在，但编译器能生成运行时 props，不会吞掉 `value/open` 等关键字段。

如果坚持只保留一个接口：
- 去掉 `HTMLAttributes` 的继承，改为显式挑几个常用的（`class/style/id` 等）；或者
- 把带索引签名的部分拆出去，不要传给 `defineProps`。

总之，问题核心在于 “把带索引签名的类型直接传给 `defineProps`”，不是类型本身完全错误，而是用法不当。建议按上面的分层/去索引方案重构一次，避免后续类似隐患。

_**Agent (gpt-5.1-codex-max 2025-11-28 10:59:49Z)**_

`providers` 下面如果也把 `HTMLAttributes` 混进了 props，再直接 `defineProps<接口>()`，会重现同样的问题。建议你在这些文件做同样的整理：

原则：
- 组件的 props 接口不要继承 `HTMLAttributes`/`ButtonHTMLAttributes` 之类带索引签名的类型。
- `defineProps` 直接用精确的 props 接口；如果需要透传 attr，就显式补 `class`/`style`/`id` 等常用键。

操作提示（以 `packages/vue/src/providers` 为例）：
1) 找出继承 `HTMLAttributes` 的接口，去掉继承或只 Pick 需要的键。
2) 确认 `<script setup>` 里 `defineProps` 用的就是去掉索引签名后的接口。
3) 不再使用 `satisfies` 或 runtime/类型拆分。

可以先 `rg "HTMLAttributes" packages/vue/src/providers` 找到需要改的文件，按上面模式处理即可。

<script setup lang="ts">
import { getDocument, getWindow } from '@destyler/dom'
import { computed, ref } from 'vue'
import { runIfFn } from '../../utils'
import { EnvironmentContextProvider } from './use-environment-context'
import type {EnvironmentProviderProps} from './type'

const props = defineProps<EnvironmentProviderProps>()
const spanRef = ref<HTMLSpanElement | null>(null)

const getRootNode = () => runIfFn(props.value) ?? spanRef.value?.ownerDocument ?? document

const environment = computed(() => ({
  getRootNode,
  getDocument: () => getDocument(getRootNode()),
  getWindow: () => getWindow(getRootNode()),
}))

EnvironmentContextProvider(environment)
</script>

<template>
  <slot></slot>
  <span v-if="!props.value" hidden ref="spanRef"></span>
</template>
